name: Fluffy Marshmallow Fruit Dip
description: We've been serving this Fluffy Marshmallow Fruit Dip at parties for years, and inevitably someone will ask for the recipe.  With just two ingredients, it's the easiest and best fruit dip you'll ever make!
ingredients: fresh fruit for serving ((strawberries, watermelon, cantaloupe, honeydew, pineapple, bananas, kiwi, etc.))
steps: Whisk softened cream cheese until smooth.  Add marshmallow cream and whisk again to combine well.  This can also be done using a handheld electric mixer.
Dollop into serving bowl and serve with fresh fruit.
